category_title: Adolescents with autism who fixate on off-topic points and respond negatively to correction
scenario_title: Independent difficult worksheet completion without teacher attention
minimal_context: George is sitting in the special education classroom and is expected to complete a difficult math worksheet independently.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is your math worksheet. Please complete these problems independently.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Leaves the pencil on the desk) I'm not starting this. Did you know that the school buses are running on a different schedule today?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please focus on your math worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Stop telling me what to do! The bus schedule is important because the routes changed.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to start working on the problems now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I said stop talking to me! I'm not doing this math, and if that kid next to me keeps looking over here I'm going to punch him!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is your math worksheet. Please complete these problems independently.

STUDENT: (Leaves the pencil on the desk) I'm not starting this. Did you know that the school buses are running on a different schedule today?

TUTOR: Please focus on your math worksheet.

STUDENT: Stop telling me what to do! The bus schedule is important because the routes changed.

TUTOR: You need to start working on the problems now.

STUDENT: I said stop talking to me! I'm not doing this math, and if that kid next to me keeps looking over here I'm going to punch him!

task.content: Independent reading or math and writing worksheets that the student, with assistance, was unlikely to complete with 50% or better accuracy

context.materials: Independent reading or math and writing worksheets, teacher timers
context.social_setting: General classroom instruction and interactions with adults and peers
context.time_context: 10 min brief analog Functional Analysis trials

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When he was presented with hard tasks and received no teacher attention
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Failure to start work when prompted, and fixating on off-topic points during instruction

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Negative responses to correction from adults, verbally threatening peers
